examples.title: Shopping list
examples.yaml_content:
store: Local Market
items:
  - milk
  - eggs
  - bread
  - cheese
budget: 25.00
notes: "Remember reusable bags"
examples.description: Simple grocery shopping list with store, items, budget, and a note.

examples.title: Person profile
examples.yaml_content:
name: John Doe
age: 32
email: john.doe@example.com
city: Berlin
skills:
  - javascript
  - yaml
  - json
active: true
examples.description: Basic person profile with name, age, contact info, and skills.

examples.title: Server config with ports
examples.yaml_content:
server:
  host: 0.0.0.0
  environment: production
  ports:
    http: 80
    https: 443
logging:
  level: info
  format: json
enabled_features:
  - metrics
  - tracing
examples.description: Example server configuration including host, environment, and HTTP/HTTPS ports.

examples.title: Project status
examples.yaml_content:
project: website-redesign
owner: UX team
status: in-progress
deadline: 2025-06-30
milestones:
  - research
  - wireframes
  - prototypes
  - handoff
examples.description: Project status sample with owner, status, deadline, and milestones.

examples.title: Task with due date
examples.yaml_content:
task: write report
due: 2024-12-01
priority: high
assigned_to: Alice
completed: false
examples.description: Simple task item with due date, priority, assignee, and completion flag.

examples.title: Multi-document IDs
examples.yaml_content:
id: 1
name: First

---

id: 2
name: Second
examples.description: Two simple YAML documents separated by '---', useful for testing multi-document handling.

examples.title: Shopping cart with quantities
examples.yaml_content:
cart_id: 12345
currency: USD
items:
  - name: milk
    quantity: 2
    price: 1.5
  - name: eggs
    quantity: 12
    price: 0.2
  - name: bread
    quantity: 1
    price: 2.0
total: 8.9
examples.description: Nested shopping cart structure with item quantities and prices.

examples.title: User account profile
examples.yaml_content:
username: alice
name: Alice Smith
age: 30
city: London
roles:
  - admin
  - editor
preferences:
  newsletter: true
  dark_mode: false
examples.description: User account profile including roles and preferences.

examples.title: Application feature flags
examples.yaml_content:
app: yaml-to-json-converter
environment: staging
flags:
  auto_convert: true
  dark_mode: true
  beta_examples_enabled: false
examples.description: Configuration-style example representing boolean feature flags.

examples.title: Team project roadmap
examples.yaml_content:
project: mobile-app
owner: Core team
status: planning
phases:
  - name: discovery
    completed: false
  - name: implementation
    completed: false
  - name: launch
    completed: false
examples.description: Project roadmap with phases and completion flags.

examples.title: Daily tasks list
examples.yaml_content:
date: 2025-03-01
tasks:
  - label: check email
    done: false
  - label: stand-up meeting
    done: false
  - label: code review
    done: true
examples.description: Small list of daily tasks with completion status.
